GLSBI.settings.menu.name: PF2e Stat Block Importer
GLSBI.settings.menu.label: Open Importer
GLSBI.settings.menu.hint: Paste strict Markdown PF2e NPC stat blocks, preview parsed data, then create or update NPC actors.
GLSBI.settings.motionTier.name: Animation Level
GLSBI.settings.motionTier.hint: Etched Glass motion intensity. Cinematic adds flourish; Reduced keeps only essential transitions.
GLSBI.window.title: PF2e Stat Block Importer
GLSBI.notify.targetTypeOnly: Stat block import targets NPC or hazard actors only.
GLSBI.notify.requiresPf2e: GLUniverse PF2e Stat Block Importer requires the PF2e system.
GLSBI.notify.selectActorUpdate: Select an existing NPC or hazard actor to update.
GLSBI.notify.typeMismatch: Parsed stat block is a {parsedType}; cannot update a {actorType} actor.
GLSBI.notify.selectActorExport: Select an existing NPC or hazard actor to export.
GLSBI.notify.spellNotFound: Spell not found in PF2e compendium: {name}
GLSBI.notify.itemsFailed: {count} item(s) could not be imported and were skipped: {names}
GLSBI.dialog.heading: PF2e NPC Stat Block Importer
GLSBI.dialog.subtitle: Paste strict Markdown, validate PF2e data, then create, update, or export NPC actors.
GLSBI.dialog.sourcePlaceholder: Paste strict Markdown stat block here
GLSBI.dialog.hint: Strict Markdown lets the importer build PF2e NPC fields, strikes, actions, spellcasting entries, items, effects, auras, inline checks and damage, condition links, and explicit rule elements.
GLSBI.preview.standbyHint: Paste a strict Markdown stat block and click Parse Preview.
GLSBI.validation.heading: Validation
GLSBI.validation.unresolvedAttackEffect: Attack effect may not resolve automatically: {effect}
GLSBI.validation.ruleMissingKey: Rule Element is missing a key.
GLSBI.validation.unknownRuleKey: Unknown Rule Element key for the installed PF2e version: {key}
GLSBI.validation.spellNotFound: Spell not found in PF2e spell compendium: {name}
GLSBI.validation.itemGeneric: Inventory item will be created as generic {type}: {name}
GLSBI.parse.acDefault: AC was not detected; defaulting to 10.
GLSBI.parse.hpDefault: HP was not detected; defaulting to 10.
GLSBI.parse.noDisable: No Disable entry detected for this hazard.
GLSBI.parse.noAutomation: No attacks, actions, or spells detected.
GLSBI.parse.ruleElementsNotJson: RuleElements must be JSON objects or arrays; ignored: {text}
GLSBI.parse.damagePart: Could not parse damage part "{part}" on {name}.
GLSBI.parse.criticalOnly: Critical-only damage on {name} is preserved in the text but cannot be represented as an NPC Strike damage category.
GLSBI.parse.looseReader: Parsed using the loose stat block reader; review the preview before importing.
